STRUGGLER-BERSERKER_HELM.description: The first time your HP falls below {HpThreshold:diff()}%, gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
STRUGGLER-BERSERKER_HELM.flavor: The helm remembers its last wearer.
STRUGGLER-BERSERKER_HELM.title: Berserker Helm
STRUGGLER-BRAND_OF_SACRIFICE.description: At the start of combat, gain 3 [gold]Ammo[/gold]. Whenever you take unblocked attack damage, gain 1 [gold]Struggle[/gold]. While at or below {HpThreshold:diff()}% HP, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card each turn.
STRUGGLER-BRAND_OF_SACRIFICE.flavor: Marked for doom. The brand bleeds when evil draws near.
STRUGGLER-BRAND_OF_SACRIFICE.title: Brand of Sacrifice
STRUGGLER-GODOTS_STEEL.description: At the start of combat, attacks deal {Damage:diff()} additional damage.
STRUGGLER-GODOTS_STEEL.title: Godot's Steel
STRUGGLER-HAWKS_FEATHER.flavor: A bittersweet memento of the Band of the Hawk.
STRUGGLER-HAWKS_FEATHER.title: Hawk's Feather
STRUGGLER-PUCKS_DUST.description: The first time [gold]Berserk[/gold] would deal self-damage each combat, prevent it.
STRUGGLER-PUCKS_DUST.flavor: Fairy dust that steadies the mind.
STRUGGLER-PUCKS_DUST.title: Puck's Dust
STRUGGLER-RICKERTS_GIFT.flavor: A farewell gift with a hidden cannon and a loaded magazine.
STRUGGLER-RICKERTS_GIFT.title: Rickert's Gift
STRUGGLER-SKULL_KNIGHTS_BLESSING.descrip: Entering an Elite or Boss room grants [gold]Elite Hunter[/gold].
STRUGGLER-SKULL_KNIGHTS_BLESSING.title: Skull Knight's Blessing
STRUGGLER-WORN_CLOAK.description: At the start of your turn, if you have [gold]Struggle[/gold], gain {StrugglePower:diff()} [gold]Struggle[/gold].
STRUGGLER-WORN_CLOAK.title: Worn Cloak
